title: Transportation Passes * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Transportation Passes * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Older Adults AIDS/HIV Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF IMPACT NW IMPACT NW SOUTHEAST MULTICULTURAL SENIOR CENTER TRANSPORTATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists older adults and adults with disabilities in accessing transportation. Provides escorted door-to-door rides, monthly TriMet bus and LIFT tickets for those who qualify, and group rides to major grocery stores, food banks, and recreational outings. 4610 SE Belmont Street Portland, OR 97215 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (503) 226-0700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details IMPACT NW TRANSPORTATION SERVICES
